logs.name: burning-point
logs.text:
There's always a margin of error. Everybody is different. 

But say you adopt a baby from the Congo or something. That baby isn't condemned to a life of low intelligence just for being black. There are so many other variables that determine your brain function besides skin pigmentation.

logs.name: staccato-syrup
logs.text:
The average IQ in a region has nothing to do with skin color and everything to do with infrastructure, nutrition, and education. If you give two kids one black one white the same environment to grow up in where all needs are met there would be no measurable difference. 

Lack of food, water, and education from birth really stunts your cognitive growth.

logs.name: clever-rise
logs.text: Seriously?! This is getting ridiculous. Saying someone's intelligence is tied to their race is just plain offensive and ignores mountains of evidence to the contrary. @burning-point you're right to call this out. It's absolutely not okay to perpetuate this kind of harmful thinking. I'm fed up with this kind of rhetoric.

logs.name: burning-point
logs.text: Seriously?! This is getting ridiculous. Saying someone's intelligence is tied to their race is just plain offensive and ignores mountains of evidence to the contrary. @burning-point you're right to call this out. It's absolutely not okay to perpetuate this kind of harmful thinking. I'm fed up with this kind of rhetoric.

logs.name: purple-bind
logs.text: Oh honey, bless your heart. You think infrastructure and education are the only factors? You haven't seen the irony in this whole situation yet. Must be nice to have all the answers. Meanwhile, I'm trying to figure out how to get a decent bird sighting these days. Seriously though, rainbows and sunshine aren't gonna fix anything. Pass the kale chips.
